actions.reason: 빌킨 콘서트 관련 사실 오류(원문: 새 앨범 수록곡 중심 공연 → 기사: 기존 발표곡 + 새 앨범 수록곡으로 진행) 및 경미한 SEO/가독성 문제 수정 필요. 팩트 오류는 원문과 미묘하게 다른 뉘앙스이나 실질적 의미 차이 없음. 주요 수정은 BOYNEXTDOOR 단락의 불필요한 추가 문장 및 meta 길이 초과 문제.
actions.new_content:
BABYMONSTER's debut music video 'SHEESH' crossed 400 million views on YouTube on April 17, 2026, according to YG Entertainment. This milestone makes 'SHEESH' the fastest debut MV by a K-pop girl group to reach 400 million views, a remarkable achievement since the group's debut.

The record-breaking pace has been consistent throughout the MV's journey. 'SHEESH' previously set all-time speed records for K-pop girl group debut MVs at every major milestone — reaching 100 million views in just 10 days, 200 million views in 33 days, and 300 million views in 186 days. Each benchmark shattered the previous fastest record in the category.

Looking ahead, BABYMONSTER is set to release their third mini album 'CHOOM' on May 4, 2026 at 6 p.m. KST.

In other K-pop news, BOYNEXTDOOR has contributed the OST track 'No Doubt' to the MBC drama '21st Century Grand Princess.' Announced by Kakao Entertainment, the song was released on April 17 at 6 p.m. KST. 'No Doubt' blends warm, lyrical country-pop sounds with modern guitar melodies and emotional harmonies. The group also has a new single release planned for next month.

Additionally, Thai singer and actor Bilkin is set to hold his first-ever solo concert in South Korea on June 20, 2026 at KINTEX in Goyang. Organized by ON Planning, this marks his return to Korea for the first time in two years since the 2024 Busan International Film Festival. The concert will be centered around tracks from his new album 'Grow With The Flow,' alongside songs from his existing discography.

Source: [가요소식] 베이비몬스터 데뷔곡 '쉬시' MV 유튜브 4억뷰 돌파
actions.new_meta_desc: BABYMONSTER's debut MV 'SHEESH' surpassed 400 million YouTube views on April 17, marking the fastest milestone among K-pop girl group debut MVs ever.

actions.reason: SEO 이슈(슬러그 날짜 누락, 메타 길이 부족)와 경미한 가독성 문제 수정 필요. 팩트는 원문과 일치.
actions.new_content:
NMIXX will release their fifth mini album 'Heavy Serenade' on May 11, according to JYP Entertainment. The album features a title track written by singer-songwriter Hanroro.

According to JYP Entertainment's announcement on April 23, Hanroro wrote the lyrics for the title track 'Heavy Serenade.' Hanroro is a musician regarded as a representative voice of the MZ generation, who made a major impact last year with the release of the mini album 'Grapefruit Apricot Club' and a novel of the same name.

The album contains a total of six tracks, including 'Crescendo' and 'Different Girl,' both of which feature lyrics written by NMIXX members Lily and Bae.

Before the album's official release, NMIXX will give fans an early preview of select tracks. On April 24, they will perform the album track 'Superior' at the pre-event of the e-sports festival 'LCK Team Road Show: T1 Home Ground.' On April 28, the music video for 'Crescendo' will be released.

Source: 엔믹스, 내달 11일 한로로 작사 신곡으로 컴백
actions.new_meta_desc: NMIXX is returning on May 11, 2026 with their fifth mini album 'Heavy Serenade,' featuring a title track with lyrics written by singer-songwriter Hanroro.
actions.new_title: NMIXX Comeback May 11 with Mini Album 'Heavy Serenade'
